reviews.review_msg: I thought Paul Crowe was an okay prof until the lecture got switched to online and he started replying to students' email in a rude and unrefined attitude. He is for sure a picky marker, your marks can be heavily taken off if one of your sentences isn't written correctly.

very relaxed prof. very knowledgeble abt hinduism.the text bk is ur bible. for presentation make sure u do ur reasarch apart 4m wats in the text bk. do not expect good marks if u just say things tat r in the assigned text bk for the term. otherwise he is very easy.
